sections.paragraph:
φιλαργυρέω (φιλάργυρος; Epicurus; Alciphron 4, 15; Sext. Emp., Math. 11, 122; SIG 593, 12 [196/194 b.c.]; 2 Macc 10:20) love money, be avaricious 2 Cl 4:3.

Epicurus Epicurus , IV–III b.c.—List 5

Sext. Emp. Sext. Emp. = Sextus Empiricus, II–III a.d.—List 5

Math Math = mathematician

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1056
